zh.lifeSummary: 當Lettice Ardene於1124年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾斯泰斯比時，她的父親Henricus De Ardene27歲，母親Oliva21歲。她於大約1143年與Geffrey le Savage在英國英格蘭德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1180年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lettice Ardene于1124年出生在英国英格兰越可爾斯泰斯比时，她的父亲Henricus De Ardene27岁，母亲Oliva21岁。她于大约1143年与Geffrey le Savage在英国英格兰德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1180年在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ardene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name, either from the district of Arden in Warwickshire or from Arden in Bredbury (Cheshire). The first placename is thought to be derived from a Celtic word meaning ‘high place’, cognate with Ardennes, the name of a forested region on the borders between northeastern France and eastern Belgium. The second derives from Old English hēah ‘high’ + worthign ‘enclosed settlement’.

variants.name: Harden
meanings: English: variant of Arden with prosthetic H-.

English: habitational name, either from Haredene Wood in East Tisbury (Wiltshire), or from Haredon (in Ugborough, Devon). The first placename probably derives from Old English hara ‘hare’ + denu ‘valley’. The second is from Old English hara + dūn ‘hare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Lettice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the medieval vernacular form of the Latin name   Laetitia .  It was in use in Britain in the Middle Ages, but then fell out of use until revived by the Victorians. It is now once again out of fashion.

en.lifeSummary: When Lettice Ardene was born in 1124, in Stainsby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henricus De Ardene, was 27 and her mother, Oliva, was 21. She married Geffrey le Savage about 1143, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1180, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lettice Ardene est née en 1124, à Stainsby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henricus De Ardene, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Oliva, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Geffrey le Savage environ 1143, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1180, à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lettice Ardene 1124 in Stainsby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henricus De Ardene 27 und ihre Mutter Oliva 21. Sie hat um 1143 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Geffrey le Savage geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1180 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lettice Ardene è nata il nel 1124 nel Stainsby, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henricus De Ardene, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Oliva, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Geffrey le Savage circa 1143, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1180, nel Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lettice Ardeneが1124年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスティインスビーで生まれた時，父Henricus De Ardeneは27歳，母Olivaは21歳であった。約1143年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアでGeffrey le Savageと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1180年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lettice Ardene(이)가 1124년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스테인스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henricus De Ardene(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Oliva(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1143년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 Geffrey le Savage(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lettice Ardene nasceu em 1124, em Stainsby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henricus De Ardene, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Oliva, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Geffrey le Savage aproximadamente 1143, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1180, em Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lettice Ardene родилась в 1124 г. в местности стеинсби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henricus De Ardene было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Oliva, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geffrey le Savage около 1143 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1180 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

Se casó con Geffrey le Savage aproximadamente 1143, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija.
